sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36876" key="e)capopne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαπο-πνέω</orth>, <sense id="n36876.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breathe quite away,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸν βίον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg001:364" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">364</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg001:6:185" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.185</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
